title: kohautia subverticillata
intro: Kohautia subverticillata is a perennial plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its small, white, and fragrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, coughs, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Kohautia subverticillata include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
